title: calocarpum mammosum var. candollei
intro: Calocarpum mammosum var. candollei, also known as the pink or red bael fruit tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calocarpum mammosum var. candollei include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, as well as its potential anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tonics, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
